settings.title: Warm the Oil Gently
settings.description: Place the bottle in warm water for 2–3 minutes or rub a few drops between your palms to warm it. Warm oil absorbs better and enhances the massage experience.

settings.title: Massage in Circular Motions
settings.description: Apply generously and massage in upward and circular motions for 5–10 minutes. This self-care ritual supports circulation and helps the herbs penetrate into the tissue.

settings.title: Use Daily for Best Results
settings.description: Consistent daily application, ideally in the morning or before bedtime, gives the herbs time to nourish and support the skin over weeks of regular use.

settings.heading: Your Daily Self-Care Ritual
settings.subheading: 3 simple steps to nourish and care for yourself every day

settings.title: Nourishes & Hydrates Skin
settings.description: Rich herbal base deeply nourishes and softens skin. Regular massage keeps the skin supple, elastic, and well-hydrated.

settings.title: Supports Skin Firmness
settings.description: Herbal oils and botanical extracts traditionally used in Ayurveda to support healthy skin tone and natural tissue resilience.

settings.title: Promotes Relaxation
settings.description: The ritual of warm oil massage (Abhyanga) is a cornerstone of Ayurvedic self-care. Supports stress relief and overall mental calm.

settings.title: 100% Natural Base Oil
settings.description: No mineral oil, parabens, or synthetic fragrances. A clean herbal formula safe for regular topical use on sensitive skin areas.

settings.heading: More Than Just an Oil

settings.heading: Herbs Chosen for Women's Wellness

settings.question: How do I use the Breast Care Oil?
settings.answer: Warm a generous amount of oil by rubbing it between your palms or placing the bottle in warm water. Apply to the area and massage gently in circular, upward motions for 5–10 minutes. Use daily, morning or evening, for best results.

settings.question: Is this oil safe during pregnancy or breastfeeding?
settings.answer: We strongly recommend consulting your OB-GYN or Ayurvedic physician before using any herbal topical product during pregnancy or while breastfeeding. Some herbal ingredients may not be suitable during these periods. Do not apply near nipple area while nursing.

settings.question: How long before I see results?
settings.answer: With consistent daily massage, most users notice improved skin texture and firmness within 4–6 weeks. The Ayurvedic approach focuses on gradual, holistic improvement rather than immediate results.

settings.question: Does it have any fragrance or scent?
settings.answer: The oil has a natural, mild herbal aroma from the botanical ingredients. No synthetic fragrances are added. If you have fragrance sensitivities, perform a patch test on the inside of your wrist before regular use.

settings.question: Is the packaging discreet?
settings.answer: Yes. All orders are shipped in plain, neutral packaging with no product description on the outside. Your privacy is completely protected — the outer box only shows the shop name and address.

settings.title: The self-care ritual I always needed
settings.review: Between work and family, I never took time for myself. This oil changed that. My skin is softer but honestly, the mental wellness benefit is even better. Thank you Hindrishi.

settings.title: Pure, natural, and genuinely relaxing
settings.review: I've tried many oils but this one is different. The herbal scent is natural and calming. After 6 weeks of daily massage my skin feels noticeably firmer and more nourished. Will definitely repurchase.

settings.title: Love the Ayurvedic approach
settings.review: The discreet packaging was a relief. Product quality is excellent — you can tell the herbs are real. Makes my massage routine feel like a luxury spa experience. Highly recommend.
